name: Tushar Jain
tagline: Results-driven Software Developer specializing in scalable backend microservices and robust full-stack solutions. Proficient in NestJS, Python, Node.js, and cloud-native technologies.
about: A highly motivated Software Developer with a strong academic background in Electronics and Communication Engineering, complemented by a robust foundation in data structures, algorithms, and object-oriented programming. I specialize in designing and implementing scalable backend services, optimizing API performance, and developing comprehensive full-stack applications. I am committed to delivering robust, efficient solutions and thrive in collaborative environments focused on tackling complex technical challenges.
highlights: Architected and developed scalable backend services using NestJS, implementing modular architecture and well-defined REST APIs.
Built Python-based microservices for PDF processing and asynchronous workflows.
Designed and implemented REST APIs and database schemas using Node.js and MongoDB.
Optimized API performance and improved frontend-backend integration for better system efficiency.
Established CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions, improving deployment reliability.
Collaborated with a team to develop an AI/ML-based Flipkart recommender system, achieving Semi-Finalist status in Flipkart Grid 5.0.
Selected for Amazon ML Summer School 2024.

projects.name: Contest-Saathi
projects.description: Developed a contest reminder web application that provides personalized email notifications for real-time updates. Successfully cultivated a dedicated user base of over 50 active subscribers, ensuring timely delivery of contest reminders and critical updates through an integrated email service.

projects.name: Insight Terminal
projects.description: Engineered a Cobra-based CLI tool designed to streamline user interaction with Gemini AI, significantly enhancing command-line efficiency. This tool integrates advanced natural language processing to deliver accurate, real-time responses and facilitate direct information retrieval within the terminal environment.
